enhancements.title: Scan Bill turns a competitor's paper bill into an instant switch quote
enhancements.detail: Tap Scan Bill and snap a photo of a competitor's bill — Rep Assist reads every line automatically and builds a side-by-side savings comparison for switching to us, including home internet and $10 perks. As you add or remove services the customer mentions, the quote updates live.
enhancements.answer: Scan Bill lets you take a photo of a customer's competitor bill, and Rep Assist uses AI to read every line and instantly build a savings comparison covering phone lines, perks, and home internet. As you add or remove services the customer mentions, the quote recalculates right in front of you so the savings stay accurate.

walkthrough.intro: Learn how to turn a customer's paper bill into an on-the-spot savings comparison.

steps.title: Open the tray and tap Scan Bill
steps.detail: Swipe up the bottom tray and choose Scan Bill from the quick actions.

steps.title: Snap a clear photo of the bill
steps.detail: Line up the bill so all the charges are readable, then take the photo.
steps.tip: Good lighting helps the extraction come out accurate on the first try.

steps.title: Let Rep Assist read the lines
steps.detail: Rep Assist automatically extracts each charge and service from the bill — no typing needed.

steps.title: Review the savings card
steps.detail: You'll see current cost vs. our new cost side by side, including perks and home internet options.

steps.title: Adjust lines to re-quote live
steps.detail: Add or remove services as the customer describes their needs, and the savings numbers update instantly.

enhancements.title: Scan Barcode pulls up any product instantly
enhancements.detail: Tap Scan Barcode and point your camera at a UPC label — Rep Assist reads the code and pulls up the matching product card with pricing and details, no manual searching needed.
enhancements.answer: Scan Barcode opens your camera, reads the UPC on a box or shelf tag, and looks up the exact product for you, showing a card with pricing and details in seconds. If the scanner can't read a barcode, you can type the number in manually instead.

walkthrough.intro: Learn how to scan a product barcode instead of typing a search.

steps.title: Open the tray and tap Scan Barcode
steps.detail: Swipe up the bottom tray and choose Scan Barcode from the quick actions.

steps.title: Point your camera at the UPC
steps.detail: Hold the barcode steady in frame until Rep Assist detects it.

steps.title: Enter it manually if needed
steps.detail: If the barcode won't scan, tap to type the UPC number in by hand.

steps.title: Review the product card
steps.detail: Rep Assist shows the matching product with pricing and details.

steps.title: Add it to the cart
steps.detail: If the customer wants it, add the item straight from the product card.

enhancements.title: Navigation moved into a swipe-up tray, with a roomier message box
enhancements.detail: The old hamburger menu is gone — everything now lives in a draggable tray you swipe up from the bottom of the screen, snapping to half or full height. It holds New chat, Scan Barcode, Scan Bill, Check In, Performance, Recent Orders, My Tickets, Resolution Desk, System Enhancements, The Opener, and Settings. Your message box also grows as you type and keeps its buttons lined up along the bottom.
enhancements.answer: Instead of tapping a hamburger icon, you now drag up the tray at the bottom of the screen to reveal all your navigation and quick actions — it snaps to a half view or a full view depending on how far you drag it. The message box was also rebuilt so it grows as you type longer messages, with the send and action buttons staying aligned along the bottom.

walkthrough.intro: Get comfortable using the new bottom tray for navigation and quick actions.

steps.title: Swipe up from the bottom of any screen
steps.detail: Drag the tray handle upward to reveal the menu.

steps.title: Let it snap to half or full height
steps.detail: A short drag opens it halfway; a longer drag opens it full screen.

steps.title: Tap New chat or a quick action
steps.detail: Choose New chat, Scan Barcode, Scan Bill, or Check In right from the top of the tray.

steps.title: Browse the rest of the menu
steps.detail: Scroll to find Performance, Recent Orders, My Tickets, Resolution Desk, System Enhancements, The Opener, and Settings.

steps.title: Dismiss the tray
steps.detail: Drag it back down or tap outside it to close.

enhancements.title: Dark mode is here — choose Light, Dark, or System
enhancements.detail: Head to Settings → Appearance to switch Rep Assist between Light and Dark, or let it automatically match your phone or computer's setting. Your choice is remembered the next time you open the app, with no flicker when it loads.
enhancements.answer: In Settings under Appearance, you can pick Light, Dark, or System — System just follows whatever your phone or computer is already set to. The app remembers your choice and applies it instantly, without any flash or flicker when Rep Assist opens.

walkthrough.intro: Switch Rep Assist's look to match your preference or your device's setting.

steps.title: Open the tray and tap Settings
steps.detail: Swipe up the tray and choose Settings from the list.

steps.title: Tap Appearance
steps.detail: This opens the theme options.

steps.title: Choose Light, Dark, or System
steps.detail: Pick whichever mode you want the app to use.
steps.tip: System keeps Rep Assist in sync automatically if your device switches themes at sunset.

steps.title: See the app switch instantly
steps.detail: Every screen updates right away — no need to restart the app.

enhancements.title: Checkout now works like a real store POS — with bill review, signatures, and phone handoff
enhancements.detail: The in-chat cart is now a full point-of-sale flow. Adding a device automatically recommends device protection (you can remove it), and you can add perks, accessories, and trade-in credit, then choose pickup or ship. When you're ready to check out, a 'View Together' card shows the current bill vs. the new bill vs. blended monthly cost, plus everything due today — taxes, activation, and accessories. The cart tray pops open briefly whenever you make a change, then automatically tucks itself back down after a couple seconds so it doesn't block the chat — you can still tap to keep it open manually. You can finish on your screen with a simulated payment and captured signature, or text/QR-code the checkout straight to the customer's own phone so they can review and sign it themselves while you both watch it update live.
enhancements.answer: Once you've built a cart, tap to check out and Rep Assist shows a 'View Together' card comparing the customer's current bill, the new bill, and the blended monthly cost, along with everything due today like taxes, activation fees, and accessories. From there you can finish the sale on your own screen with a simulated payment and captured signature, or hand it off by texting a link or showing a QR code so the customer finishes it on their own phone.

walkthrough.intro: Learn how to build a full cart with add-ons and finish checkout either yourself or by handing it to the customer's phone.

steps.title: Build the cart as usual
steps.detail: Say things like 'add a line' or 'upgrade this phone' and Rep Assist builds the cart in the drawer as before.

steps.title: Watch the cart tray flash open on changes
steps.detail: Every time you add or edit something, the tray pops fully open so you can see the update, then tucks back down after a couple seconds.
steps.tip: Tap the tray if you want to keep it open manually.

steps.title: Review the extras that come with a device
steps.detail: Device protection is recommended by default when a device is added — remove it if the customer doesn't want it — and you can add perks, accessories, and trade-in credit too.

steps.title: Choose pickup or ship
steps.detail: Pick how the customer will get their device or accessories.

steps.title: Open the View Together bill review
steps.detail: Tap to check out and see current vs. new vs. blended monthly cost, plus everything due today.
steps.tip: Walk the customer through this card out loud — it's designed to be reviewed together.

steps.title: Finish it yourself, or hand it to their phone
steps.detail: Continue on your screen with a simulated payment and signature, or send a text link or QR code so the customer finishes on their own phone.
steps.tip: Both screens update live and stay in lock-step.

enhancements.title: Live Listen scores your visits, flags sales opportunities, and can email a recap
enhancements.detail: Live Listen keeps a transcript docked above your message box and calls out opportunities like upgrade promos or Fiber/Fixed Wireless Internet the moment you start a session — look for the 💡 badge on a customer's queue entry beforehand. When you end the session, Rep Assist grades the visit against the playbook with a 1-5 star score, breaks down what you did well and what to work on, and can email the customer a short AI-written recap with one tap. Visit the Coaching tile anytime to revisit past graded visits and get a suggested script.
enhancements.answer: Live Listen automatically pulls in the customer's account or order info, keeps the transcript pinned above your chat, and reminds you to bring up any 💡 flagged opportunity like an upgrade promo or home internet. When you stop the session, you get a star rating with strengths and gaps, an option to email the customer a quick recap, and access to the Coaching tile for a suggested script based on that visit.

walkthrough.intro: Practice running a full Live Listen session from opportunity spotting through wrap-up coaching.

steps.title: Check the queue for a 💡 badge
steps.detail: Look for customers Rep Assist flags as eligible for an upgrade promo or home internet offer.

steps.title: Tap Assist and start Live Listen
steps.detail: The customer's account or order info carries in automatically.

steps.title: Watch the docked transcript while you talk
steps.detail: It stays pinned above your message box the whole session.

steps.title: Listen for the opportunity callout
steps.detail: Live Listen reminds you early on to mention the flagged opportunity.
steps.tip: Bring it up early — it's easy to forget once the conversation moves on.

steps.title: Tap Stop and review your Playbook Score
steps.detail: You'll see a star rating plus a breakdown of strengths and gaps.

steps.title: Send a recap or open Coaching
steps.detail: Tap 'Send visit summary' to email the customer a recap, or open 🎯 Coaching later for a suggested script.

enhancements.title: See the whole store queue at a glance — and now assist with one tap
enhancements.detail: A badge in the top bar always shows how many customers are waiting, being helped, and picking up online orders, updating on its own. Tap it to open the full queue with waiting customers, in-progress visits, pickup orders, and today's appointments — and you can now tap Assist right on a waiting customer's row to claim them without leaving the queue view.
enhancements.answer: The top bar badge shows live counts like waiting, active, and ISPU (in-store pickup), and tapping it opens a drawer with waiting customers, in-progress visits, pickup orders, and today's remaining appointments. You can now tap Assist directly on a waiting customer's row inside that drawer to claim them and jump straight into chat with their details already filled in.

walkthrough.intro: Learn how to check the queue badge and claim a waiting customer directly from it.

steps.title: Glance at the top bar badge
steps.detail: You'll see a compact count like '3 wait / 2 active / 1 ISPU' that refreshes automatically.

steps.title: Tap the badge
steps.detail: This opens the Live Queue drawer with the full breakdown.

steps.title: Find a waiting customer
steps.detail: Look in the Waiting section for who's next.

steps.title: Tap Assist on their row
steps.detail: This claims the customer and drops you straight into chat with their name and details already filled in.
steps.tip: You no longer need to leave the queue drawer to start helping someone.

steps.title: Check pickup orders and appointments too
steps.detail: Scroll down to see online orders needing pickup and today's remaining scheduled appointments.

enhancements.title: Check in walk-in customers and manage the front-desk queue
enhancements.detail: A Check In option, now available right from the swipe-up tray, lets you log a walk-in customer's name, phone, and reason for the visit, plus their account or order number if you have it. Everyone waiting shows up in a queue card, and tapping Assist on an entry pulls their info straight into chat.
enhancements.answer: Use the Check In option in the tray to log a walk-in customer with their visit reason, contact info, and account or order number if known, and they'll appear in the store's queue card in arrival order. Tap Assist on their entry to claim it — Rep Assist drops you into chat with their name and details already filled in.

walkthrough.intro: Learn how to check in a walk-in customer and pick them up from the queue.

steps.title: Open the tray
steps.detail: Swipe up the bottom tray to see the Check In quick action.

steps.title: Tap Check In
steps.detail: This opens the intake form for a walk-in customer.

steps.title: Fill in the customer's details
steps.detail: Enter their name, phone number, reason for the visit, and account/order number if known.

steps.title: Submit the check-in
steps.detail: The customer appears in the store's queue card in arrival order.

steps.title: Find them in the queue
steps.detail: Open the queue card or the Live Queue badge to see everyone waiting.

steps.title: Tap Assist to claim them
steps.detail: This drops you straight into chat with their details already filled in.
steps.tip: No need to re-ask for info they already gave at check-in.

suggestions: How do I scan a competitor's bill for a savings quote?
How do I turn on dark mode?
How does Live Listen score my visits?
